2606.09227.title: Trustworthy Smart Fabs via Professional Proxies: Scaling Safe and Sustainable by Design (SSbD) through Industrial Data Spaces
2606.09227.paper_summary: The convergence of the 2026 European Union Safe and Sustainable by Design (SSbD) framework, Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive (CSDDD), and Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) introduce a severe governance bottleneck for advanced semiconductor manufacturing facilities ("Smart Fabs"). Regulatory compliance demands have surpassed the capacity of manual corporate reporting, creating a direct conflict between multi-stakeholder transparency and corporate data privacy. This paper addresses this challenge by introducing a zero-trust socio-technical orchestration framework that operationalizes a six-layer SSbD reference architecture within trustworthy industrial data spaces. We propose a shift from reactive automation to autonomous governance through "Professional Proxies"-role-based agentic workflows executing within hardware-isolated trust zones. Structured as an interoperable network protocol stack, the framework coordinates an automated, five-step "relay race" between Facility, Process Engineering, and Finance proxy teams to align factory-floor yield models with macro-level sustainability mandates. By executing Virtual Metrology (VM) predictions and Federated Machine Learning (FML) inside hardware-rooted Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs), this architecture resolves the Data Sovereignty Paradox, demonstrating how fabs can export cryptographically signed compliance tokens via International Data Spaces (IDS) connectors without exposing proprietary process recipes. Ultimately, this framework provides technology managers with a verifiable, evidence-based pathway toward resilient, net-zero Industry 5.0 ecosystems.
2606.09227.paper_summary_zh: 2026年歐盟安全與可持續設計（SSbD）框架、企業可持續性盡職調查指令（CSDDD）和碳邊境調整機制（CBAM）的融合，為先進半導體製造設施（“智慧工廠”）帶來了嚴重的治理瓶頸。監管合規要求已超過手動企業報告的能力，造成多方利益相關者透明度與企業數據隱私之間的直接衝突。本文通過引入一個零信任社會技術協調框架來應對這一挑戰，該框架在可信的工業數據空間內實現六層SSbD參考架構。我們提議通過“專業代理”-基於角色的代理工作流程，將反應式自動化轉變為自主治理，這些工作流程在硬體隔離的信任區域內執行。該框架結構為一個可互操作的網絡協議棧，協調設施、流程工程和財務代理團隊之間自動化的五步“接力賽”，以使工廠產量模型與宏觀層面的可持續性要求保持一致。通過在硬體根植的可信執行環境（TEE）內執行虛擬計量（VM）預測和聯邦機器學習（FML），該架構解決了數據主權悖論，展示了工廠如何通過國際數據空間（IDS）連接器導出加密簽名的合規令牌，而不暴露專有的工藝配方。最終，該框架為技術管理者提供了一條可驗證的、基於證據的道路，朝向韌性、淨零的工業5.0生態系統。
2606.09227.author: Han-Teng Liao et.al.
2606.09227.authors: Han-Teng Liao, Chang-Yi Kao, Karen Ang
